title: Splitwaters to Develop E-Fuels Facilities Using Topsoe's Technologies
content: Splitwaters announces plans to develop a number of e-fuels facilities utilizing its state-of-the-art alkaline electrolyzers and Topsoe technology for the backend fuels and chemicals production. By leveraging modular design principles and managing the projects Splitwaters aims to streamline processes and potentially reduce CAPEX by up to 30%.
author: Analysts Account
